title: epilobium campestre
intro: Epilobium campestre, also known as field willow or broad-leaved willowherb, is a perennial plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, which help to treat various health issues such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and prostate problems. The health benefits of Epilobium campestre include reducing inflammation, improving urine flow, and preventing the formation of kidney stones. Epilobium campestre can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support kidney health and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract disorders.
